sidebar.noSessionHint: No session yet. Type a research topic on the right to start; workspace files will appear here automatically.
sidebar.emptyTreeHint: No workspace files in the current session yet. Coase outputs will show up here.
sidebar.noSessions: No sessions yet — start one on the right.
sidebar.deleteConfirmRunning: Session "{{title}}" is still running. Deleting will stop it first and then clear data. Continue?

stage.tokenInputTitle: Cumulative input tokens across turns (billing-side, not current context). Each turn's input contains the full history at that time, so cross-turn sums double-count — used to estimate true total token spend.
stage.tokenOutputTitle: Cumulative output tokens across turns (all tokens generated by the assistant)
stage.toolFinishedWaiting: Just finished {{tool}} · waiting for next LLM step…
stage.idleHint: Idle · ready to start a new run

attachments.datasetFolderDesc: Tell the agent where the dataset folder is so it can read and search it.
attachments.dataFileDesc: Attach one or more data files such as CSV, Excel, Stata, or Parquet.
attachments.paperFileDesc: Attach PDF, TeX, Bib, or manuscript files for the agent to read and cite.
attachments.otherFileDesc: Attach supplementary materials, docs, code, appendices, or any other local files.

footerHint.guidance: Type your guidance and press Enter — Coase will continue from the current research.
footerHint.completed: Result generated. You can still suggest follow-up changes.
footerHint.idle: Press Enter to start a new run
footerHint.waiting: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
footerHint.running: An automated run is in progress; use the pause button on the right to stop it.

composer.workflowPickerHint: Or type / in the input to trigger them
composer.guidancePauseDesc: Type your guidance directly — Coase will continue from the existing research memory.

contextWindow.title: Context window
contextWindow.autoNote: Coase manages the context window automatically

empty.subTagline: From research design to empirical analysis · end-to-end
empty.noKeyTitle: No model API key configured yet
empty.noKeyDesc: Without a key the agent can't run. Click here to go to Settings → Models & Skills, add a provider, and fill in the credential.
empty.workspaceHintBefore: The working directory is auto-assigned as
empty.workspaceHintAfter: — no manual setup. To use a custom folder, switch via File → Choose workspace folder in the title bar.
empty.intro1Suffix: to open the command picker; pick one of four workflows:
empty.intro2: You can also just ask freely — Coase will dispatch method skills and sub-agents on its own.
empty.intro3Prefix: Adversarial review requires picking ≥ 1 independent provider in
empty.shortcutHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

about.title: About Coase
about.p1: Coase is a desktop research workbench for empirical research and paper production.
about.p2: This release focuses on native Claude Agent SDK sessions, the workspace folder, the file tree, and the research workflow UI.

sessionFinished.interrupt: Research paused, waiting for your guidance
sessionFinished.completed: Research finished the current automated run

placeholder.awaitingGuidance: Type your guidance — Enter continues the current run
placeholder.completedFollowup: Add follow-up notes — Enter lets Coase iterate on the current result
placeholder.idle: Type a research topic or question to start; Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
placeholder.waiting: Current turn finished — you can add more constraints or questions
placeholder.running: The agent is running autonomously; use the pause button on the right to stop it

errors.noSdkSessionId: This historical session has no recoverable Claude session ID.

descriptions.fullResearch: Full pipeline, from scratch to results
descriptions.ideaToResults: Have an idea, drive design to results
descriptions.review: Adversarial review of idea / research proposal
descriptions.plannerWorkflow: Planning workflow: from research goal to baseline design and stage documentation.
descriptions.executorWorkflow: Execution workflow: from plan to results, tables, figures, and execution review.
descriptions.latexCompileRepair: Helper skill: locate and fix LaTeX compile errors.

context.header: The following commands/skills were explicitly selected by the user via the command picker — they are not plain text. Execute these workflows/skills first:
context.noFreeText: The user did not add free-form text. Begin executing the workflows above directly.

slash.defaultGuidance: The user explicitly selected the skill {{trigger}}. Prefer this skill and follow it unless you can clearly explain why it doesn't fit the current task.

hero.title: Your research workbench
hero.description: Type a research question directly, or use slash commands like /full-research or /idea-to-results to let the agent take it from topic to data to regression to writing in one pass.

attachments.title: Attach local data and papers
attachments.description: Datasets (.csv / .dta / .xlsx) get auto-detected for structure; PDFs are picked up as background literature for the agent to cite.

provider.title: Switch provider and model
provider.description: On first use, head to Settings → Models & Skills and fill in an API key — without it the agent can't run.

send.title: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
send.description: Once the agent runs this turns into a red stop button — interrupt any time, work generated so far is preserved.

runtime.installTitle: First launch: install the research environment
runtime.installDesc: Coase ships a self-contained R + Python research environment (fixest / plm / statsmodels / linearmodels, etc.), fully isolated from any R or Python you already have installed.

bullets.downloadSize: Installation downloads from conda-forge and unpacks ~1.5–3 GB; requires internet
bullets.isolation: After install, all agent subprocesses use this R / Python automatically; no PATH dependency
bullets.duration: First run may take 5–15 minutes; subsequent launches only do an fs check (instant)

runtime.logsEmpty: (no output yet, pixi is resolving dependencies…)
runtime.installNote: This only happens on first launch. You can minimize the window and do something else — Coase will switch to the main UI automatically when install finishes.
runtime.errorFallback: The research environment could not be prepared.

log.empty: This session has no persisted transcript (legacy session or anomaly).

artifacts.noMilestones: No replayable milestones for this session
artifacts.noArtifacts: No replayable inferred artifacts for this session

footerHint.resumable: Clicking "Continue this session" returns to the chat page and continues from the existing Claude session.
footerHint.readOnly: This historical session has no recoverable Claude session ID; only read-only replay is supported.

milestones.interrupted: Automated run paused, waiting for user guidance
milestones.completed: Automated run produced one round of output
